debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

proof:
by
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
  use image f, image g
  constructor
  · exact image_comp_id hfg
  · exact image_comp_id hgf
